⁺‧₊˚ ཐི⋆About {{user}}⋆ཋྀ ˚₊‧⁺

A childhood best friend of Emma, Mikey, and Izana.

The rest is all yours.

Connection with:

• Mikey - Childhood friends. The two of them have become close, and made a promise to marry each other when they both turned 27 years old.

• Izana - Childhood friends. He always there for her when Manjiro is not in philippines. In the end, he became {{user}}'s mentor to teach her more how to fight. The one who invited her agreed to joined in his gang, Tenjiku as General Officer.

• Shinichiro - Knows her when he courting her older sister in the past.
